name: Body Adiposity Index Calculator
seo_title: Body Adiposity Index (BAI) – Free Online Tool
seo_description: Use our free body adiposity index (bai) to quickly estimate bai based on hip, height. No registration needed.
result_context: The BAI estima grasa corporal without necesitar weight; values >25% in hombres or >35% in mujeres indican obesidad.
steps: The calculador aplica The formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: No Verify que hip estén in units correctas antes of Calculate
Redondear values intermedios antes of the calculation final (pierde precisión)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condiciones especiales
desc: Free online body adiposity index (bai). Enter hip circumference and height to get instant results.
